slides.title: Traits
Trait Example
slides.codeSnippet:
<?php
trait Timestampable {
    public $createdAt;
    public $updatedAt;
    public function setTimestamps() {
        $this->createdAt = new DateTime();
        $this->updatedAt = new DateTime();
    }
}
class Post {
    use Timestampable;
    public function __construct() {
        $this->setTimestamps();
    }
}
$post = new Post();
var_dump($post->createdAt);
?>

quizData.question: What keyword is used to include a trait in a class?
quizData.explanation: Inside a class, you write `use TraitName;` to include a trait.
